input_text: Daniel journeyed to the office. The teacher showed the students a map. Muggles can not disappear. The room was cleaned by the maid. A tall and quiet man entered. Estonia contains Tartu. Elephants have no long red trunks. The handle of Mary's suitcase broke. Tallinn is a city. Birds are in the box. The letter was written by Eve. John is an elephant. The nice animal lifted a stone. Emajogi's length is 80 kilometers. The cat sat on the mat and purred. This book is more interesting than that one. The road leading to the village was narrow. Penguins do not fly. John has a long red trunk?
